author: Dr15Jones
body:
#### PR description:

- naming improvements
- consolidated all IOV handling to EventSetupRecordIOVCoordinator
  - includes moving EventSetupRecordIntervalFinding handling to that class 
  - EventSetupProvider and EventSetupRecordProvider only deal with how data products gotten
- have DependentRecordIntervalFinder directly get access to the EventSetupRecordIntervalFinders it needs rather than indirectly through EventSetupRecordProvider
- improved testing

#### PR validation:

Code compiles. Framework unit tests pass

resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2310
resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2309
resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2308
resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2307
resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2305
resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2312
title: EventSetup Refactoring
